title: initiative.support_added / initiative.support_withdrawn event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.6. Produced by epd2_initiative_service.events.support_record_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_support_added_event (initiative.support_added) and build_support_withdrawn_event (initiative.support_withdrawn) - verified by reading events.py, both call the identical payload function. Deliberately excludes support_actor_reference/credential_reference from the wire event (see support_record_full_state_payload for Audit Core's complete snapshot). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-leakage control (INV-01/INV-03): account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on a payload that validates against this schema.
